name: Qoyod API
description: Qoyod is a platform that helps businesses manage accounting, invoicing, inventory, projects, and POS with real-time insights and automation. The API provides access to 19 resource types including accounts, products, inventories, vendors, bills, invoices, customers, and more. All requests require an API-KEY header. Supports ransack for searching and sorting.
